items.final_wording: Supports previous-anesthesia history, medical therapy, focused examination, airway and physical-condition assessment, and factors affecting perioperative risk.

source.title: Basic Standards for Preanesthesia Care
source.population: Patients receiving anesthesia care, with emergency modification permitted.
source.exclusions: Exact for record review, patient interview, focused examination, previous anesthesia and medical therapy, risk-relevant physical condition, tests, consultations, consent, and documentation. UAE policy and emergency modifications remain local responsibilities.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports previous-anesthesia history, medical therapy, focused examination, airway and physical-condition assessment, and factors affecting perioperative risk.

items.rationale: The exact ASA standard supports previous anesthesia and medical history obtained during the preanesthesia interview, including relevant family information when it affects anesthetic risk.

items.final_wording: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

source.title: Statement on Documentation of Anesthesia Care
source.population: Patients receiving anesthesia services across preanesthesia, intraoperative, and postanesthesia phases.
source.setting: Anesthesia care continuum and anesthesia medical records.
source.exclusions: Exact for documentation fields and continuity of anesthesia records. It supports recording clinician-assessed facts and completed plans, not generating management, medicines, doses, procedures, referrals, discharge, or urgency.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

items.rationale: The exact ASA preanesthesia documentation section supports risk, airway, cardiorespiratory, reviewed-investigation, consultation, plan, and consent fields for Anesthesia family history documentation; each remains clinician-entered and conditional on assessment.
